title: retiniphyllum scabrum
intro: Retiniphyllum scabrum, also known as Rough-leaved Retiniphyllum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Retiniphyllum scabrum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
